overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a sunset stroll along Del Perro Beach promenade. The camera moves from an open beach view past a bench with a seated NPC, continues along a building-lined walkway, then follows a jogging woman past a parking lot and fenced area as the sun sets over the ocean.

camera passes close by standing NPC on the left side

standing near the path as camera passes by

calm ocean reflecting the sunset colors

small lifeguard station on the beach in the distance
tall palm tree silhouetted against the sunset
ornate black street lamp with multiple lanterns
park bench facing the ocean with a seated person

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide beachfront view during a vibrant sunset. The camera moves forward along a concrete promenade, passing a wooden bench where an NPC sits facing the ocean. A lifeguard tower stands in the distance on the sand, and vintage street lamps line the right side of the path.

events.description: passing pedestrians walking in opposing directions along the path
approaching area with multiple benches and seated groups

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade past beachfront apartment buildings and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt walking in the opposite direction
two people sitting on a bench facing the beach

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with balconies facing the beach
external spiral staircase on the apartment building
green hedge lining the building wall
amusement pier with ferris wheel visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the promenade now lined with beachfront apartment buildings on the left featuring distinctive spiral staircases. The Del Perro pier with its ferris wheel becomes visible in the distance. The camera passes pedestrians including a person in a yellow shirt and others seated on benches, while vintage street lamps continue to line the path.

events.description: camera begins following a jogging woman and increases pace
left side transitions from buildings to chain-link fence and parking lot

agents.ego_description: following a woman jogging along the beachfront path at a faster pace

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear jogging ahead of the camera
people sitting on benches along the beach wall

entered.detail: paved parking area with marked spaces
black sport utility vehicle parked in the lot
blue metal fence separating the path from the parking area
tall lighting rigs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to following a jogging woman along the path. The left side changes from residential buildings to a parking lot with a chain-link fence. A black SUV is parked nearby, and stadium floodlights become visible in the distance. The Del Perro pier remains visible ahead as the camera maintains pace with the jogger along the beachfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal promenade that shifts from an open beachfront view to a more urbanized walkway. It begins by gliding past a wooden bench and a distant lifeguard tower under a vibrant sunset, with vintage street lamps lining the path. As the camera moves forward, the open sand gives way to beachfront apartment buildings with spiral staircases on the left, while the Del Perro pier and its ferris wheel emerge in the distance. The scene then transitions to follow a jogging woman as the residential architecture shifts into a parking lot enclosed by a chain-link fence. Finally, the camera maintains its pace past a parked black SUV and distant stadium floodlights, keeping the pier in sight against the fading light.
